title: Beyond the Mine: Why India’s Mineral Future Depends on Refining
description: In Short: India is racing toward a high-tech, clean-energy future, driven by ambitious climate goals and a push for domestic manufacturing. However, beneath the surface of this progress lies a critical bottleneck.
